Our work

A peek at the pack 🐾

Real pieces, made to order for real Best Furry Friends. Tap any photo to shop our latest on Etsy.

Your pet is family. Their gear should say so.

BFF Bark Boutique was born from a lifelong love of animals. From a young age, every furry friend gravitated to my daughter — and that connection grew into a passion for making personalized pieces that celebrate the bond between people and their pets.

Today, every bandana, towel, and gift is custom embroidered, made to order in our Texas studio — with intention, care, and a whole lot of love (and maybe some pet hair 🐾).

Meet Bella — our BFF & muse 🐾

— Suzanne, Owner

Not just dogs

Don’t Forget Your Other BFFs 🐾

Cats and horses deserve custom made love, too. Dogs may be our specialty — but they’re not our only Best Furry Friends. Whether it’s a cat who needs a custom bandana or a horse who deserves a personalized touch, we can make something special for every member of your family.
